originContent: * Use (Shift+)AltGr+Key to type Mathematical Symbols (Refer to AMaDiA_ReplacementTables)
translatedContent: * Use (Shift+)AltGr+Key to type Mathematical Symbols (Refer to AMaDiA_ReplacementTables)

originContent: * Calculate with +,-,±,×,÷,√,^,°, Integral f(x) dx, d(f(x))/dx, y'(x), complex numbers, sin(), cos(), tan(), exp(), log() , π , E and more
translatedContent: * Calculate with +,-,±,×,÷,√,^,°, Integral f(x) dx, d(f(x))/dx, y'(x), complex numbers, sin(), cos(), tan(), exp(), log() , π , E and more

originContent: * Solve an equation with unknown variables
translatedContent: * Solve an equation with unknown variables

originContent: * Test for equality of two terms
translatedContent: * Test for equality of two terms

originContent: * Use mathematic Unicode symbols to type faster!
translatedContent: * Use mathematic Unicode symbols to type faster!

originContent: * Turn on units in the options to do things like convert_to(7foot+3inch,m)
translatedContent: * Turn on units in the options to do things like convert_to(7foot+3inch,m)

originContent: * For more detailed usage check out Help/Examples and copy/paste the examples to the according tab input fields
translatedContent: * For more detailed usage check out Help/Examples and copy/paste the examples to the according tab input fields

originContent: * Tab 2 : Convert input to LaTeX and display it
translatedContent: * Tab 2 : Convert input to LaTeX and display it

originContent: * Tab 3 : Plot 2D Graphs (3D and complex Graphs are WIP)
translatedContent: * Tab 3 : Plot 2D Graphs (3D and complex Graphs are WIP)

originContent: * Tab 4 : Equations with matrices and vectors as well as systems of linear equations
translatedContent: * Tab 4 : Equations with matrices and vectors as well as systems of linear equations

originContent: * System Control Window : Everything for System Control (WIP)
translatedContent: * System Control Window : Everything for System Control (WIP)

originContent: * Intended for sharing equations with other users in the same network to make cooperative working easier
translatedContent: * Intended for sharing equations with other users in the same network to make cooperative working easier

originContent: * Allows sending of text and text files
translatedContent: * Allows sending of text and text files

originContent: * Share text files with all other users in the network via drag'n'drop into the input field
translatedContent: * Share text files with all other users in the network via drag'n'drop into the input field

originContent: * WARNING: Messages are currently not encrypted! Do not send sensitive data!!!
translatedContent: * WARNING: Messages are currently not encrypted! Do not send sensitive data!!!

originContent: * Create two files "AMaDiA.bat" and "AMaDiA_INSTALL.bat" and copy the text from the two file in WINDOWS-INSTALL into them by rightcklicking on them and selecting the modify option
translatedContent: * Create two files "AMaDiA.bat" and "AMaDiA_INSTALL.bat" and copy the text from the two file in WINDOWS-INSTALL into them by rightcklicking on them and selecting the modify option

originContent: * doubleclick on "AMaDiA_INSTALL.bat" to install AMaDiA (The installation location is the user folder. This can be changed by editing both files.)
translatedContent: * doubleclick on "AMaDiA_INSTALL.bat" to install AMaDiA (The installation location is the user folder. This can be changed by editing both files.)

originContent: * From now on doubleclicking on AMaDiA.bat will update and then run AMaDiA
translatedContent: * From now on doubleclicking on AMaDiA.bat will update and then run AMaDiA

originContent: (Disclaimer: Use theses .bat files on your own risk. I doubt they can cause any harm but i am no expert on batch files and can not foresee all eventualities)
translatedContent: (Disclaimer: Use theses .bat files on your own risk. I doubt they can cause any harm but i am no expert on batch files and can not foresee all eventualities)

translatedContent: * If anyone has a good description of how to easily install/update+run a python script on OSX feel free to inform me so I can add it here

originContent: Planned features for near future (order reflects priority) (note that the word "short" is very relative here):
translatedContent: Planned features for near future (order reflects priority) (note that the word "short" is very relative here):

originContent: - (Continuous:) Better parser to allow a more flexible input
translatedContent: - (Continuous:) Better parser to allow a more flexible input

originContent: Planned features for future (order reflects priority):
translatedContent: Planned features for future (order reflects priority):

originContent: - Make Tab 4 even easier to use
translatedContent: - Make Tab 4 even easier to use

originContent: - Automatic recognition for PDEs so that the user no longer has to put them in "pdsolve(...)"
translatedContent: - Automatic recognition for PDEs so that the user no longer has to put them in "pdsolve(...)"
